title: Ако си начинаещ трейдър – започни с това!
author: TradeTravelChill
summary_bullets: Hello friends and welcome back to the list of how to start trading in 2026.
Until then, we were going through quite important things, we talked about what trading is and what type of traders exist.
We were looking at the most common mistakes that destroy the account of the start.
After that, we were looking at the basics of technical analysis.
We showed you something, a trade-by-design system and how we look at the market.
In the last video, I showed you how to use TradingView and combine all these tools.
Today, we are going to do the next logical step.
I will show you a strategy that we use as a basis for trading with a trend, namely, Ani's fish.
This is not a magic indicator, this is a framework that helps you to see the structure of the market.
You need to grab some of the movement and the most important thing is to stop losing money when you are trading with a trend.
